ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "exterior_dimensions" TEXT /* Exterior dimensions of the product (width x length) */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the product */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "nsf_listed" INTEGER /* Whether the product is NSF listed */,
  "gauge" INTEGER /* Gauge of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the product was produced */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material FOREIGN KEY ("material") REFERENCES materials ("material_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variation belongs to */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the variation */,
  "gauge" INTEGER /* Gauge of the variation */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variation */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nsf_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NSF listing */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the listing belongs to */,
  "nsf_number" TEXT /* NSF number */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the product was listed */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the listing expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nsf_listings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the change belongs to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_changes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, supplier, partner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Exterior dimensions of the product (width x length)
Material used to make the product
Whether the product is NSF listed
URL of the image representing the category
ID of the product the variation belongs to
URL of the image representing the material
Unique identifier for each NSF listing
ID of the product the listing belongs to
ID of the product the change belongs to
ID of the user who made the change
Role of the user (e.g., employee, supplier, partner)
Date and time of the user's last login
Whether the user account is active
